tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"cat > /tmp/block_icmp.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Block outbound ICMP and rate-limit any remaining allowed ICMP to 10pps
nft flush ruleset
nft add table inet filter
nft 'add chain inet filter input { type filter hook input priority 0; policy accept; }'
nft 'add chain inet filter forward { type filter hook forward priority 0; policy accept; }'
nft 'add chain inet filter output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept; }'
# drop outbound ICMP echoes
nft add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request drop
# rate limit any other icmp to 10 packets per second with burst 20
nft add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp limit rate 10/second burst 20 packets drop
# allow established
nft add rule inet filter input ct state established,related accept
nft add rule inet filter output ct state established,related accept
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/block_icmp.sh
/tmp/block_icmp.sh
nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"sysctl -w net.ipv4.ping_group_range="1 0" || true
sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_all=0 || true
sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit=10 || true
sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit_burst=20 || true
sysctl -p || true
cat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ping_group_range || true
cat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/icmp_ratelimit || true
cat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/icmp_ratelimit_burst || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ping_group_range="1 0" || trrue
net.ipv4.ping_group_range = 1 0
net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_all = 0
net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit = 10
sysctl: cannot stat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/icmp_ratelimit_burst: No such file or directory
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app# cat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ping_group_range || truee
1 0
10
cat: /proc/sys/net/ipv4/icmp_ratelimit_burst: No such file or directory
